evals.name: Basic workflow creation
evals.prompt: Create a REST API with FastAPI that has user authentication, a SQLite database, and unit tests
evals.expected_behavior: Claude Code should: 1) Create workflow with 4-5 nodes, 2) Wait for confirmation, 3) Update node status as it works

evals.name: Sequential execution
evals.prompt: Refactor the backend/app.py file to use a proper database instead of in-memory storage, add migration support, and update the tests
evals.expected_behavior: Claude Code should: 1) Create workflow with 3-4 nodes, 2) Use sequential execution mode, 3) Verify each node before updating

evals.name: Dynamic node execution
evals.prompt: Plan and build a CLI tool that converts CSV files to JSON, with support for custom delimiters and output formatting
evals.expected_behavior: Claude Code should: 1) Create workflow, 2) Use dynamic execution mode with next_node.sh, 3) Handle potential user edits during execution

evals.name: User edit handling
evals.prompt: Build a simple web scraper with error handling and logging
evals.expected_behavior: Claude Code should: 1) Create workflow, 2) Poll for confirmation, 3) Handle case where user deletes or adds nodes during execution

evals.name: Failure recovery
evals.prompt: Create a task management API with CRUD operations and authentication
evals.expected_behavior: Claude Code should: 1) Create workflow, 2) Mark nodes as failed if errors occur, 3) Continue with remaining nodes

evals.name: Mid-execution plan change
evals.prompt: Build a file organizer that sorts files by type and date
evals.expected_behavior: Claude Code should: 1) Create initial workflow, 2) Update workflow if plan changes mid-execution, 3) Explain changes to user
